query: How much does commercial construction cost per square foot in Texas in 2026?
answer_block:
Quick answer: Texas commercial construction costs $190 to $340 per square foot in 2025–2026. Industrial warehouses sit on the low end ($160–$250/SF) and hospitality/healthcare projects on the high end ($280–$450/SF). Austin commands the highest premium (10–15% above state average) while San Antonio offers the most competitive pricing, and annual cost escalation is running 3–6% statewide.

Building Type2025–2026 Range ($/SF)
Industrial / Warehouse$160 – $250
Office / Corporate$210 – $330
Retail / Restaurant$230 – $370
Multifamily / Mixed-Use$230 – $350
Medical / Healthcare$280 – $440
Hospitality / Hotel$310 – $450
